user.title: Cellcom Energy — Step 1 of 3
user.description: Enter the mobile number registered to your Cellcom Energy account.

browser_login.title: Cellcom Energy — Step 2 of 3
browser_login.description:
**How to send the verification SMS:**

1. Open **https://cellcom.co.il/my-cellcom** in your browser.
2. Open the browser console: press **F12** → click the **Console** tab.
3. Paste the command shown below and press **Enter**.
4. A prompt will appear with a GUID — copy it and paste it in the field below.

```
{snippet}
```

*(Phone: {phone})*

data_description.guid: Paste the GUID that appeared in the browser prompt after running the command

otp.title: Cellcom Energy — Step 3 of 3
otp.description: A 6-digit SMS code was sent to **{phone}**. Enter it below.

id_number.title: Verify Your Identity
id_number.description: Enter the Israeli ID number (תעודת זהות) registered to your Cellcom account.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Cellcom Energy
reauth_confirm.description: Your session has expired. Follow the same steps to log in again for **{phone}**.

reauth_otp.title: Enter New SMS Code
reauth_otp.description: A new 6-digit code was sent to {phone}.

reauth_id.title: Verify Your Identity
reauth_id.description: Enter your Israeli ID number to complete re-authentication.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach Cellcom servers. Check your internet connection or try again in a few minutes.
error.invalid_phone: Invalid phone number. Enter a valid Israeli mobile number (10 digits, starting with 0).
error.invalid_guid: The GUID looks incorrect. Make sure you copied the full value from the browser prompt.
error.invalid_otp: The code is incorrect or has expired. Re-run the browser command to get a new GUID and SMS code.
error.invalid_id: The ID number does not match this account.
error.no_energy_account: No Cellcom Energy account found for this number. Make sure you have an active electricity account.
error.otp_expired: The verification code has expired. Please restart the login.
error.too_many_attempts: Too many failed attempts. Wait a few minutes and try again.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. See the HA log for details.

abort.already_configured: This Cellcom Energy account is already configured.
